title: DNA extraction using the ammonium acetate technique
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"6ksbn","text":"If blood is preserved in ethanol, it has to be dried before starting.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 50 µl of blood, 200 µl of a DNA extraction solution (which includes tris-HCL 30 mM ph 8, EDTA 10 mM, and 0,4% SDS), and 3 µl proteinase K. undetermined, Blood undetermined, DNA extraction solution undetermined, Proteinase K
Add 200 µl AcNH4 4 M. Vortex and incubate 30 minutes. Shake every 10 minutes. undetermined, AcNH4 4 M 00:30:00, Vortex and incubation 00:10:00, Shake
Move the supernatant to new tubes.
Add 800 µl of cold EtOH 100%. undetermined, EtOH
Wash the pellet with 800 µl of EtOH 70%. undetermined, EtOH 70%
Add 200 µl TE Buffer and leave 2-3 hours in the oven at 37°C undetermined, TE Buffer 03:00:00, Oven Undetermined
Also incubate 70°C around three hours shaking frequently. Undetermined 03:00:00, Incubation
creator: Juan Carlos Illera
